title: Kimi K2.6 and Agent Swarm explained..
summary: MoonShot AI released Kimi K2.6, an improved coding model designed for long-running tasks and agent swarm applications. The model demonstrates enhanced capabilities for code generation and multi-agent coordination compared to its K2.5 predecessor.
